values.fullName: Do not know many of our competitors
Have good understanding of competitors based on reliable sources
Know who competitors generically ought to be
Do not know the key decision maker%28s%29 for the deal
Have identified the key decision maker%28s%29 for the deal
Have identified the key decision maker%28s%29 for the deal and understand some of their perceptions
Have identified the key decision maker%28s%29 for the deal and understand their perceptions of the deal requirements%2C us%2C our competition
Have a good understanding based on reliable sources
Have some understanding based on limited resources
Customer has requested information of leasing vs financing
Exisiting Customer has requested a lease quote
New Customer that has not explicitly addressed leasing
Have a proven marketing manager and a team available and committed
Have a proven marketing manager and some team members available and committed
Have not identified team and committed to their availability
Critical importance to customer and required approvals to proceed have been secured
Deal has support from the relevant evaluators and meets customer requirements
Deal meets significant customer requirements and has support among decision makers
None or limited importance to relevant evaluators
Facing many competitors offering similar or better deals
Offer is superior to others but still faces competition
Offer is very compellive compared to alternative available to customer
Other offers could better meet customer requirements
Do not intend to use deal process
Experienced%2C frequent users of deal process
Have used deal process on occasion
